ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_usage_statistics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the data is collected */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of water usage (e.g., Total, Residential, Industrial) */,
  "scenario" INTEGER /* Scenario category (e.g., high, low) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of water usage as per unit */,
  "unit" INTEGER /* The unit of measurement for value (e.g., Thousand cubic metres) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the water_sources table */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the water_quality table */,
  "forecasted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data is forecasted or actual */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level for forecasted data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_statistics_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_statistics_scenario FOREIGN KEY ("scenario") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_statistics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES water_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_statistics_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_id") REFERENCES water_quality ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_statistics_province FOREIGN KEY ("province") REFERENCES provinces ("province_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_statistics_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES usage_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_statistics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "water_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the province's area covered by water */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of water usage */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the usage type (e.g., Total, Residential, Industrial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the usage type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the usage type is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the usage type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario (e.g., high, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the scenario is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* The actual year value (e.g., 2005) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* The name of the unit (e.g., Thousand cubic metres) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the unit is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., government official, researcher, public) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., anomaly, threshold exceeded) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality record */,
  "province_code" TEXT /* Code of the province where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the water */,
  "contaminants" TEXT /* Type of contaminants present in the water */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the water_sources table */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the water quality meets regulatory standards */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the water quality record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_province_code FOREIGN KEY ("province_code") REFERENCES provinces ("province_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES water_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water source */,
  "province_code" TEXT /* Code of the province where the source is located */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of water source (e.g., river, reservoir) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the water source is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the water source */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the water source in cubic meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_sources_province_code FOREIGN KEY ("province_code") REFERENCES provinces ("province_code")
)
